15.dv: or (with the article interposed) קִרְיַת הָאַרְבַּע; (Nehemiah 11:25), from H7151 (קִרְיָה) and H704 (אַרְבַּע) or H702 (אַרְבַּע); city of Arba, or c

15.gl: ruddy i.e. a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.)
15.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.

15.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
15.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
15.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;
